element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns stick figure controls on multi-story platforms with ladders
Player must learn unpredictable guard AI patterns and avoidance
Temporary floor traps; requires understanding fill-in timing and guard behavior
Deliberately luring guards into inescapable zones or using them as tools
Creating gaps wider than floor depth; repeated dig-and-descend from ladders/bars
Environmental hazards requiring spatial awareness and timing
Strategic level design constraint; blocks certain digging paths
Walking on trapped guard heads; precise positioning during falls; counter-intuitive survival conditions
Using guards as bridges; liberating trapped guards strategically; gold-baiting sequences

typical_relief_triggers: Collecting all gold pieces in level
Reaching top of screen after gold collection
Successfully trapping a pursuing guard in hole
Guard respawning at top (removes immediate threat)
Reaching safe platform away from guards
typical_tension_triggers: Guard spawns or begins active pursuit
Player enters narrow corridor with guard nearby
Digging hole while guard is close (risk of being caught while vulnerable)
Running low on escape routes due to filled holes
Guard picking up gold that player needs
Player trapped or forced into inescapable area
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Escalating difficulty through problem-solving complexity rather than mechanical speed; early levels emphasize spatial navigation, mid-levels add guard manipulation puzzles, late levels require synthesis of all mechanics and precise timing under chase pressure

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Multiple paths to gold and exit; levels designed with 'multiple ways to travel' via different ladder/bar/platform combinations

difficulty_curve.early_game: Foundation building: basic movement, gold collection, introduction to guards and hole digging on simpler platform layouts; reaction times less critical than navigation understanding
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Mechanical complexity and strategic depth: multi-layer digging, guard trapping, introduction of trapdoors and bedrock; requires problem-solving over reflexes
difficulty_curve.late_game: Synthesis and timing: complex guard manipulation chains, head-contact mechanics, using guards as bridges, gold-baiting sequences; demands both spatial reasoning and reaction precision
notable_spikes: Introduction of guards requiring predictive movement against counterintuitive AI
First multi-layer digging puzzle requiring gap-width planning
Introduction of head-contact mechanics (fatal on downward input, safe on lateral feet-contact)
Guard-as-bridge sequences requiring falling timing and positioned liberation
Late-game puzzle chains requiring multiple guard manipulations in single level

notable_level_patterns.description: Guard pursues player; player digs hole and guards become temporarily immobilized, allowing gold collection and escape
Guards move in counterintuitive ways based on relative positioning; player must predict repulsion behavior and use it to reach otherwise blocked areas
Player must create progressively wider gaps by digging from ladder/bar positions to descend multiple brick layers and reach lower gold or exit
Gold pieces positioned such that guards collecting them become trapped; player then liberates guard and steals dropped gold
Falling guard used as temporary platform or path to reach otherwise unreachable gold or exit; requires precise timing and falling speed manipulation
Player deliberately leads guard into area with no escape; guard becomes permanently trapped or eliminated via hole-fill respawn mechanism
